summary: BLOCKS 519, 520, 523, 524 - All features verified. Spin deduplication within 5 minutes returns existing spin. spun_at timestamp field implemented. Local state updates on spin click. Golden Hive badge is <button> with side='top' tooltip. Stripe disconnect Unplug icon with 20x20px touch target.

issues: Console warnings: nested <button> inside <button> and <a> inside <a> - hydration warnings (pre-existing, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 519: Spin deduplication in collection.py lines 567-582 - queries for recent spin with spun_at >= five_min_ago, returns existing spin if found
BLOCK 519: spun_at timestamp field added to spin_doc (line 591)
BLOCK 519: Both spun_at and created_at fields present in spin documents
BLOCK 520: CollectionPage.js line 396 - setRecords(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === record.id ? { ...r, spin_count: (r.spin_count || 0) + 1 } : r)) for real-time local state update
BLOCK 519: ProfilePage.js lines 773-776 - Week in Wax Spins metric uses s.spun_at || s.created_at with 7-day rolling window
BLOCK 523: ProfilePage.js line 670 - Golden Hive badge is <button> element (not div) for touch accessibility
BLOCK 523: ProfilePage.js line 673 - onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()} to avoid side effects
BLOCK 523: ProfilePage.js line 691 - TooltipContent side='top' so thumb doesn't block on mobile
BLOCK 524: ProfilePage.js line 632 - text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] whitespace-nowrap for responsive text
BLOCK 524: ProfilePage.js line 636 - min-w-[20px] min-h-[20px] for 20x20px touch target
BLOCK 524: ProfilePage.js line 640 - Unplug icon rendered with data-testid='stripe-disconnect-icon'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing testuser1 with records
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKS 519, 520, 523, 524 all verified. testuser1 has golden_hive_verified=true showing Golden Hive badge as <button> with side='top' tooltip. Stripe disconnect icon code verified but testuser1 doesn't have Stripe connected. Spin deduplication verified via API - two quick POST /api/spins with same record_id returned same spin ID. Week in Wax correctly shows 7-day rolling window using spun_at timestamp.

block_519_spin_tracker.deduplication: PASS - Same record_id within 5 min returns existing spin ID
block_519_spin_tracker.spun_at_field: PASS - Spin docs include spun_at timestamp
block_519_spin_tracker.both_timestamps: PASS - Both spun_at and created_at present
block_519_spin_tracker.weekly_rolling_window: PASS - Week in Wax uses 7-day window with spun_at

block_520_feed_integration.local_state_update: PASS - setRecords updates spin_count immediately on spin click
block_520_feed_integration.spin_count_field: PASS - Records endpoint returns spin_count for each record

block_523_golden_hive_touch.tooltip_side_top: PASS - TooltipContent side='top' for mobile thumb clearance
